forms_dir = Path\("/Users/jph/git/joelparkerhenderson/medical-forms/forms"\)

for form in forms:
    form_name = form.name
    subdirs = sorted\([d.name for d in form.iterdir\(\) if d.is_dir\(\)]\)
    
    print\(f"\\n{form_name}"\)
    print\(f"  Subdirs: {', '.join\(subdirs\)}"\)

        subdir_path = form / key_subdir

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import os
from pathlib import Path

forms_dir = Path\("/Users/jph/git/joelparkerhenderson/medical-forms/forms"\)

# Get all form directories
forms = sorted\([d for d in forms_dir.iterdir\(\) if d.is_dir\(\) and not d.name.startswith\('.'\)]\)

# Categorize forms by implementation status
fully_implemented = []
partial_patient_form = []
partial_clinician_dash = []
partial_both = []
partial_full_stack = []
empty_clinician = []

for form in forms:
    form_name = form.name
    
    patient_status = check_subdir\(form, 'front-end-patient-form-with-svelte'\)
    clinician_status = check_subdir\(form, 'front-end-clinician-dashboard-with-svelte'\)
    fullstack_status = check_subdir\(form, 'full-stack-with-rust-axum-loco-tera-htmx-alpine'\)
    
    if patient_status == 'IMPLEMENTED' and clinician_status == 'IMPLEMENTED' and fullstack_status == 'IMPLEMENTED':
        fully_implemented.append\(form_name\)
    elif patient_status == 'PLACEHOLDER' and clinician_status == 'IMPLEMENTED' and fullstack_status == 'IMPLEMENTED':
        partial_patient_form.append\(form_name\)
    elif patient_status == 'IMPLEMENTED' and clinician_status == 'PLACEHOLDER' and fullstack_status == 'IMPLEMENTED':
        partial_clinician_dash.append\(form_name\)
    elif patient_status == 'PLACEHOLDER' and clinician_status == 'PLACEHOLDER' and fullstack_status == 'IMPLEMENTED':
        partial_both.append\(form_name\)
    elif patient_status == 'IMPLEMENTED' and clinician_status == 'EMPTY' and fullstack_status == 'IMPLEMENTED':
        empty_clinician.append\(form_name\)
    elif fullstack_status == 'PLACEHOLDER':
        partial_full_stack.append\(form_name\)

def check_subdir\(form, subdir_name\):
    subdir_path = form / subdir_name
    if not subdir_path.exists\(\):
        return 'MISSING'
    
    has_src = \(subdir_path / 'src'\).exists\(\)
    has_package = \(subdir_path / 'package.json'\).exists\(\)
    has_cargo = \(subdir_path / 'Cargo.toml'\).exists\(\)
    
    if has_src or has_package or has_cargo:
        return 'IMPLEMENTED'
    
    files = list\(subdir_path.glob\('*'\)\)
    if len\(files\) == 0:
        return 'EMPTY'
    else:
        return 'PLACEHOLDER'

print\("=" * 80\)
print\("FULLY IMPLEMENTED \(all 3 components complete\)"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
for form in fully_implemented:
    print\(f"  {form}"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("PARTIAL IMPLEMENTATIONS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

if partial_patient_form:
    print\("\\nMissing: Front-end patient form \(only clinician dashboard & full-stack\)"\)
    for form in partial_patient_form:
        print\(f"  {form}"\)

if partial_clinician_dash:
    print\("\\nMissing: Front-end clinician dashboard \(only patient form & full-stack\)"\)
    for form in partial_clinician_dash:
        print\(f"  {form}"\)

if partial_both:
    print\("\\nMissing: Both front-end components \(only full-stack implemented\)"\)
    for form in partial_both:
        print\(f"  {form}"\)

if empty_clinician:
    print\("\\nEmpty: Clinician dashboard directory \(patient form & full-stack done\)"\)
    for form in empty_clinician:
        print\(f"  {form}"\)

if partial_full_stack:
    print\("\\nIncomplete: Full-stack component is placeholder"\)
    for form in partial_full_stack:
        print\(f"  {form}"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("SUMMARY"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
print\(f"Total forms: {len\(forms\)}"\)
print\(f"Fully implemented: {len\(fully_implemented\)}"\)
print\(f"Partially implemented: {len\(forms\) - len\(fully_implemented\)}"\)

EOF)
